findings.title: SamurAIGPT/Generative-Media-Skills
findings.description: Multi-modal Generative Media Skills for AI Agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI). High-quality image, video, and audio generation powered by muapi.ai.

findings.title: bgauryy/octocode-mcp
findings.description: MCP server for semantic code research and context generation on real-time using LLM patterns | Search naturally across public & private repos based on your permissions | Transform any accessible codebase/s into AI-optimized knowledge on simple and complex flows | Find real implementations and live docs from anywhere

findings.title: GCWing/BitFun
findings.description: BitFun is a next-generation AI assistant with built-in Code Agent and Cowork Agent. It has memory, personality, and the ability to evolve over time. You can remotely control the desktop through mobile QR pairing or Telegram / Feishu bots, send instructions, and watch each execution step in real time while the Agent keeps working in the background.

findings.title: project-codeguard/rules
findings.description: Project CodeGuard is an AI model-agnostic security framework and ruleset that embeds secure-by-default practices into AI coding workflows (generation and review). It ships core security rules, translators for popular coding agents, and validators to test rule compliance.

findings.title: modelence/modelence
findings.description: Modelence is a full-stack framework for building production web apps with a built-in database, authentication and monitoring. Modelence is opinionated and AI agent-first, which means it's optimized for AI code generation with built-in guardrails.

findings.title: Xthebuilder/JRVS
findings.description: JRVS AI Agent with JARCORE autonomous coding engine - RAG knowledge base, web   scraping, calendar, code generation. Powered by whatever local AI you choose.

findings.title: NVlabs/sage
findings.description: Official Code Release of SAGE: Scalable Agentic 3D Scene Generation for Embodied AI

findings.title: kyaukyuai/gpt-all-star
findings.description: 🤖 AI-powered code generation tool for scratch development of web applications with a team collaboration of autonomous AI agents.

findings.title: AIGNE-io/aigne-doc-smith
findings.description: AIGNE DocSmith is a powerful, AI-driven documentation generation tool built on the AIGNE Framework. It automates the creation of detailed, structured, and multi-language documentation directly from your source code.

findings.title: zubair-trabzada/ai-legal-claude
findings.description: AI Legal Assistant skill for Claude Code. Contract review, risk analysis, NDA generation, compliance auditing, negotiation strategy, and PDF reports — 14 skills, 5 parallel agents. If you want to learn how to sell this to real businesses, check out the Skool community

findings.title: answerlink/MCP-Workspace-Server
findings.description: 🚀 Beyond Filesystem - Complete AI Development Environment - One MCP Server provides full Agent capability stack: web development, code execution, data processing, image generation. No need for multiple tools, configure once. Perfect support for Dify, FastGPT, Cherry Studio.       文件操作、Python/Node.js 代码执行、Web 应用一键部署（支持泛域名）、Excel 处理、图像生成。开箱即用

findings.title: markusgrotz/peract_bimanual
findings.description: Code for PerAct², a language-conditioned imitation learning agent designed for bimanual robotic manipulation using the RLBench environment. It includes dataset generation, training scripts, and evaluation tools for 6-DoF control of two robot arms across complex tasks.

findings.title: civai-technologies/cursor-agent
findings.description: Cursor Agent Tools - A Python-based AI agent that replicates Cursor's coding assistant capabilities, enabling function calling, code generation, and intelligent coding assistance with Claude, OpenAI, and locally hosted Ollama models.

findings.title: osovv/grace-marketplace
findings.description: GRACE (Graph-RAG Anchored Code Engineering): open Agent Skills for contract-driven AI code generation with semantic markup, knowledge graphs, and support for Claude   Code, Codex CLI, and Kilo Code.

findings.title: tempurai/coder
findings.description: 🚀 Next-generation AI code assistant with Multi Agent methodology

findings.title: anis-marrouchi/shadxn
findings.description: Experimenting with AI our way into the unknown — monorepo: agentx (agentic code generation engine) + shadxn (component registry & transforms)

findings.title: l3yx/intentlang
findings.description: The next-generation AI Agent framework driven by Intent Engineering. Move beyond turn-based Function Calling to embrace code-level intent expression and embedded execution.                         An AI-Native, Intent-Oriented Programming Language built on Python.

findings.title: devill/refakts
findings.description: RefakTS is a TypeScript refactoring tool built by AI coding agents for AI coding agents. It allows them to perform precise refactoring operations via command line instead of error prone text generation.

findings.title: aspenkit/aspens
findings.description: Generate AI-ready documentation for any codebase. Import graph analysis, parallel agentic discovery, skill generation for Claude Code.

findings.title: attilaszasz/sdd-pilot
findings.description: Replace chaotic AI code generation with a disciplined, spec-driven workflow. SDD Pilot enforces structured development phases and quality gates, leveraging AI agents to conduct online research for best practices and plan your architecture before a single line of code is written.
